title: Automated IT Infrastructure Recovery with Terraform
description: A bachelor thesis implementing full-stack disaster recovery automation using Terraform and Terragrunt on Azure — solving a Zero-Trust bootstrapping deadlock with IaC and cloud-init.
descriptionDe: Ein IaC-Bachelorarbeitsprojekt zur vollautomatischen Disaster-Recovery von Cloud-Infrastruktur mit Terraform, Terragrunt und GitLab CI/CD auf Microsoft Azure.
